figures.caption: Figure 4. Training loss scaling with model size for ViTs on LAION-400M. Our adjusted LA follows a trend similar to standard attention.

Figure 3. Training metrics for ViT-S/16, ViT-B/16, and ViT-L/16 models trained on LAION-400M using four NVIDIA A5500 GPUs. Linear attention with our adjustments achieves performance comparable to standard attention.
